tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All measured parameters are within normal limits except for mildly elevated LDL cholesterol and low HDL cholesterol, indicating increased cardiovascular risk. Glucose control, renal function, and electrolytes are normal. Recommend addressing dyslipidemia through lifestyle modification and/or medical therapy as appropriate, with regular follow-up for cardiovascular risk management.

display.value: Neuropathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
